sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41422" key="e)pitre/ppemptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρέπ-πεμπτος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρεπ-όγδοος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρεπ-ένατος</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope> </bibl> : <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope> </bibl> : <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope> </bibl> : <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> </bibl> l.c., cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1640.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
